content:
REQUEST: /.openfang/workspaces/coder/barbershopChuLun handle optimze popup "đặt lịch" cho nó đẹp hơn đi
ANALYSIS: <co>---
PATH: `/home/nhutdev/.openfang/workspaces/coder/barbershopChuLun`

TECH: Next.js 16.1.6, React 19.2.3, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, lucide-react

TASK_TYPE: OPTIMIZE

ANALYSIS:
- **Current state:** Booking modal has functional form with basic Tailwind styling. Dark theme with gold accents (#d5b981). Includes validation, scroll lock, escape key handling. Time slots are basic button grid with simple border/gold color states.

- **Problem:** Modal lacks visual polish. No entrance animation (just pops in). Input focus only changes border color. Time slots have minimal feedback on selection. Backdrop is flat black. No booking summary/progress indicator. Form sections blend together. Missing smooth transitions throughout.

- **Proposed solution:**
  1. Add modal entrance animation: `@keyframes modal-enter` (scale 0.95→1 + fade-in from center)
  2. Add input focus glow: `@keyframes input-focus-glow` (gold shadow expansion)
  3. Add time slot glow: `@keyframes slot-glow` (subtle gold shine on selected)
  4. Add backdrop blur effect (`backdrop-blur-md`)
  5. Add booking summary card that reveals when form 70%+ complete
  6. Add smooth transitions to all interactive elements
  7. Better visual section separation with subtle dividers

RELEVANT FILES:
- `/home/nhutdev/.openfang/workspaces/coder/barbershopChuLun/src/app/globals.css`: Add `@keyframes modal-enter`, `input-focus-glow`, `slot-glow`; add utility classes `.modal-animate`, `.input-glow`, `.slot-selected-glow`
- `/home/nhutdev/.openfang/workspaces/coder/barbershopChuLun/src/components/booking-modal.tsx`: Apply animation classes to modal/backdrop, add booking summary section that shows when name+service+date+time filled, enhance input/button styling

SCOPE: MEDIUM
NEEDS_PLANNER: YES
Reason: Coordinated changes across 2 files. Requires adding 3+ animations to CSS, new component section with conditional rendering, and updating multiple className compositions for smooth transitions.

---</co: 6:[0]>

input.message:
REQUEST: /.openfang/workspaces/coder/barbershopChuLun handle optimze popup "đặt lịch" cho nó đẹp hơn đi
ANALYSIS: ---
PATH: `/home/nhutdev/.openfang/workspaces/coder/barbershopChuLun`

TECH: Next.js 16.1.6, React 19.2.3, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, lucide-react

TASK_TYPE: OPTIMIZE

ANALYSIS:
- **Current state:** Booking modal has functional form with basic Tailwind styling. Dark theme with gold accents (#d5b981). Includes validation, scroll lock, escape key handling. Time slots are basic button grid with simple border/gold color states.

- **Problem:** Modal lacks visual polish. No entrance animation (just pops in). Input focus only changes border color. Time slots have minimal feedback on selection. Backdrop is flat black. No booking summary/progress indicator. Form sections blend together. Missing smooth transitions throughout.

- **Proposed solution:**
  1. Add modal entrance animation: `@keyframes modal-enter` (scale 0.95→1 + fade-in from center)
  2. Add input focus glow: `@keyframes input-focus-glow` (gold shadow expansion)
  3. Add time slot glow: `@keyframes slot-glow` (subtle gold shine on selected)
  4. Add backdrop blur effect (`backdrop-blur-md`)
  5. Add booking summary card that reveals when form 70%+ complete
  6. Add smooth transitions to all interactive elements
  7. Better visual section separation with subtle dividers

RELEVANT FILES:
- `/home/nhutdev/.openfang/workspaces/coder/barbershopChuLun/src/app/globals.css`: Add `@keyframes modal-enter`, `input-focus-glow`, `slot-glow`; add utility classes `.modal-animate`, `.input-glow`, `.slot-selected-glow`
- `/home/nhutdev/.openfang/workspaces/coder/barbershopChuLun/src/components/booking-modal.tsx`: Apply animation classes to modal/backdrop, add booking summary section that shows when name+service+date+time filled, enhance input/button styling

SCOPE: MEDIUM
NEEDS_PLANNER: YES
Reason: Coordinated changes across 2 files. Requires adding 3+ animations to CSS, new component section with conditional rendering, and updating multiple className compositions for smooth transitions.

---

tool_use.content:
--- ## IMPLEMENTATION PLAN ### Summary Polish the "Đặt Lịch" booking modal by adding a smooth scale+fade entrance animation, gold glow on input focus, a pulsing glow on selected time slots, backdrop blur, smooth transitions on all interactive elements, subtle section dividers, and a conditional booking summary card that appears when the user has filled name + service + date + time — all without touching existing logic. ### Branch Name `feature/booking-modal-ui-polish` ### Commit Message `feat: polish đặt lịch modal with animations, gold glow, and summary card` --- ### Steps #### Step 1: Add animation keyframes and utility classes to globals.css - Action: MODIFY - File: `/home/nhutdev/.openfang/workspaces/coder/barbershopChuLun/src/app/globals.css` - Description: Append the following inside `@layer utilities` (or at root if Tailwind v4): - `@keyframes modal-enter`: `from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.95) translateY(-8px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1) translateY(0); }` — duration 0.28s ease-out - `@keyframes slot-glow`: pulse `box-shadow` from `0 0 0px rgba(213,185,129,0)` → `0 0 14px rgba(213,185,129,0.45)` → back, infinite 1.8s ease-in-out (stops when slot deselected) - `.modal-animate`: applies `animation: modal-enter 0.28s ease-out both` - `.input-glow`: applies `box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(213,185,129,0.3)` (used via `focus:` in JSX as a static Tailwind-friendly class) - `.slot-selected-glow`: applies `animation: slot-glow 1.8s ease-in-out infinite; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(213,185,129,0.35)` - `.summary-card`: `background: rgba(213,185,129,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(213,185,129,0.18); border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 1rem;` - `.section-divider`: `height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, rgba(213,185,129,0.2), transparent); margin: 0.5rem 0;` - Code hint: `@keyframes modal-enter`, `@keyframes slot-glow`, `.modal-animate`, `.input-glow`, `.slot-selected-glow`, `.summary-card`, `.section-divider` #### Step 2: Apply animations and restructure booking-modal.tsx - Action: MODIFY - File: `/home/nhutdev/.openfang/workspaces/coder/barbershopChuLun/src/components/booking-modal.tsx` - Description: Apply UI improvements while keeping all existing state, validation, and submit logic intact: 1. **Backdrop**: Change current `bg-black/80` to `bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md` for depth. 2. **Modal container**: Add `modal-animate` class to the white/dark rounded container div. Add `shadow-[0_25px_60px_rgba(0,0,0,0.6)]` for dramatic lift. 3. **Gold top accent bar**: As first child inside the modal container, insert `
`. 4. **Input & select elements**: Add `transition-all duration-200 focus:input-glow` to every `` and `` elements add `cursor-pointer`. 5. **Time slot buttons — selected state**: Add `slot-selected-glow` and `scale-[1.03]` to the className of the currently selected time slot button. Add `transition-all duration-150` to all slot buttons. 6. **Section dividers**: After the "Thông tin cá nhân" section fieldset/group and before the "Dịch vụ" section, insert `
`. Repeat between each major section (service → barber → date → time slots). 7. **Booking summary card** — Add a derived boolean const `summaryReady`: ``` const summaryReady = !!(formData.name && formData.service && formData.date && formData.time) ``` Render after the time slot grid, inside a `{summaryReady && (...)}` block: ```

Tóm tắt lịch hẹn

[rows for: name, service + price, barber, formatted date, time]
``` Each row is a flex-row: muted label left (`text-white/40 text-sm`), gold value right (`text-[#d5b981] text-sm font-medium`). For the date, parse safely with `const [y,m,d] = formData.date.split('-'); new Date(+y, +m-1, +d).toLocaleDateString('vi-VN', {weekday:'long', day:'2-digit', month:'2-digit', year:'numeric'})` to avoid UTC offset bug. For service price, use `SERVICES.find(s => s.id === formData.service)?.price` formatted with `toLocaleString('vi-VN')` + ` đ`. 8. **Submit button**: Add `transition-all duration-200 active:scale-[0.98]` for tactile feedback. Keep existing disabled/loading states. 9. **Success state overlay**: When `status === 'success'`, instead of (or in addition to) the current behavior, render inside the modal a centered success panel with: a gold circle checkmark `✓` (40px, `border-2 border-[#d5b981] rounded-full`), heading "Đặt lịch thành công!", subtitle "Chúng tôi sẽ liên hệ xác nhận sớm nhất." — styled with existing gold + white/60 colors. This replaces the form content area while the modal is still open (auto-closes after 2.5s via existing or new `setTimeout`). - Code hint: `summaryReady`, `backdropBlur`, `modal-animate`, `slot-selected-glow`, `section-divider`, `summary-card`, success overlay JSX, date parse fix --- ### Dependencies to Install - none ### Test Plan - Click "Đặt Lịch" → modal should scale+fade in smoothly (no jump) - Click backdrop or press Escape → modal closes and form resets - Focus any input or select → gold glow ring appears around field - Click a time slot → selected slot pulses with gold glow + slight scale-up - Fill name + service + date → summary card does NOT appear yet (requires all 4) - Fill time slot → summary card fades in with correct Vietnamese-formatted date, service name + price, barber name, and time - Submit → success overlay (gold checkmark + message) replaces form for 2.5s, then modal closes - Test on mobile viewport: modal should not overflow, slots grid stays readable ### Risks - **Tailwind v4 purge**: `.modal-animate`, `.input-glow`, `.slot-selected-glow`, `.summary-card`, `.section-divider` are defined in globals.css, not in JSX — they won't be purged as long as they're referenced in JSX classNames; double-check that each class name string appears literally in the TSX file - **`slot-glow` infinite animation performance**: On low-end mobile devices an infinite box-shadow animation can cause repaints. If jank is noticed, replace `slot-glow` with a static `box-shadow` + `ring-2 ring-[#d5b981]/40` combination - **Date parse UTC offset**: `new Date('2026-03-16')` in JS is parsed as UTC midnight, which can show the previous day in UTC+7 if using `.toLocaleDateString()` — the split-and-construct approach in Step 2 item 7 resolves this
